brief.title: Sunday, July 12 — six things creators need to know

items.html: Sora API sunsets September 24 — the app is already gone, giving you an 11-week window to migrate any video pipeline off OpenAI's generator.
Kyutai released MuScriptor, an open-weight music-to-MIDI transcription model trained on 170k recordings, letting musicians extract multi-instrument MIDI from full mixes.
OpenAI risks judicial sanctions for allegedly concealing and deleting ChatGPT logs sought as evidence in the New York Times copyright lawsuit — watch this closely.
Meta launched Muse, an image model that draws on your own photo library, competing directly with Adobe Firefly and Google Imagen for personal creative workflows.
OpenAI's new GPT-5.6 Sol is 54% more token-efficient for coding tasks and ships in three tiers — Sol, Terra, and Luna — check which fits your stack.
A free browser-based tool now auto-documents ComfyUI workflows by extracting custom nodes and settings from saved PNGs — fully offline, no server required.

tooldrop.name: MuScriptor
tooldrop.blurb: Open-weight model that transcribes multi-instrument audio recordings into MIDI. Useful for musicians wanting editable notation from any mix, no subscription needed.
